title: Mulhouse, Grand Est — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Mulhouse, Grand Est: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Mulhouse is a city in Grand Est with a population of 109,000. An Alsatian industrial city with a rich textile and automotive heritage, home to the famous Cité de l’Automobile museum.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
